sections.paragraph:
pl. (compare Lehrg. p. 576)-

(1) the bowels, τὰ σπλάγχνα, as the seat of the emotions of the mind (see the root), Pro 12:10 hence very tender affection, specially love, natural affection towards relatives, Gen 43:30 Amo 1:11 1Ki 3:26 (τὰ σπλάγχνα, 2Co 6:12 7:15 ).

(2) pity, grace, favour, Isa 47:6 especially of God, Psa 25:6 40:12 . נָתַן רַחֲמִים לְ Deu 13:18 and שׂוּם רַחֲמִים לְ Isai. 47:6 to shew mercy to any one. נָתַן פּ׳ לְרַחֲמִים לִפְנֵי to obtain any one’s mercy for any one, 1Ki 8:50 Psa 106:46.
